session_hint: the landing page CLS score investigation
question: What did we conclude was causing the high Cumulative Layout Shift score on the landing page?
turns: Our landing page CLS score is 0.34 in Lighthouse — well above the 0.1 good threshold. There's a visible layout jump about 200ms after initial paint. Need to identify and fix the cause.
Checked all images: every img element has explicit width and height attributes. No dynamically injected banners or ads. All fixed-height hero sections.

Noticed the custom web font (InterVariable from our own CDN) loads after the initial render. Our @font-face declarations have no font-display property set. Without font-display: swap, the browser holds a fallback font in layout then shifts the entire page when InterVariable arrives.
Added font-display: swap to all four @font-face rules. CLS dropped to 0.03. Root cause: missing font-display: swap causing a layout shift when the web font replaced the fallback.
